role: Major General; Chief of Staff, Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters (d. 14 March 2026)
bio: Abolqasem Babaeian served as a Major General and Chief of Staff (Staff Chief) of the [Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters](/orgs/khatam-al-anbiya-central-headquarters), the coordinating body for [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) operations. He was the successor to [Gholam Ali Rashid](/people/gholam-ali-rashid) and [Ali Shadmani](/people/ali-shadmani) in this position. He was killed on 14 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave), in the same strike that killed Brigadier General [Abdullah Jalali-Nasab](/people/abdullah-jalali-nasab).

sources.title: Khatam al-Anbiya Chief of Staff Killed

editorial_notes: Killed 14 March 2026. Major General, successor to Rashid/Shadmani as Khatam al-Anbiya Staff Chief.
